title: Paintings and pottery on display at local exhibition
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  Mossel Bay ceramicist Minda du Plessis and painter Kobus Spies have once again collaborated for a joint exhibition this week, showcasing uniquely crafted paintings, pottery and jewellery.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay ceramicist Minda du Plessis and painter Kobus Spies have once again collaborated for a joint exhibition this week, showcasing uniquely crafted paintings, pottery and jewellery."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This is the fourth year this duo has hosted an exhibition open to the Mossel Bay public, this one titled ‘Bloom’."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Du Plessis told Mossel Bay Advertiser each exhibition is a collaboration between herself and Spies, and a third party they have invited to join.","html":"Du Plessis told Mossel Bay Advertiser each exhibition is a collaboration between herself and Spies, and a third party they have invited to join."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This year, the Walter Battiss Company has displayed some of South African artist Walter Battiss’ artworks, including prints, textiles and ceramics, alongside those made by Du Plessis and Spies.","html":"This year, the Walter Battiss Company has displayed some of South African artist Walter Battiss’ artworks, including prints, textiles and ceramics, alongside those made by Du Plessis and Spies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A variety of artworks are on display at this year’s exhibition. Photo: Minda du Plessis","html":"A variety of artworks are on display at this year’s exhibition. Photo: Minda du Plessis"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The two local artists have worked on their paintings, pottery and jewellery pieces throughout the year in preparation for this week’s exhibition.","html":"The two local artists have worked on their paintings, pottery and jewellery pieces throughout the year in preparation for this week’s exhibition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“By the final two months before the exhibition, that’s when we rush to get the final touches done,” said Du Plessis.","html":"“By the final two months before the exhibition, that’s when we rush to get the final touches done,” said Du Plessis."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The exhibition opened on Wednesday evening, 3 December, and will continue until 13:00 on Saturday 6 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Anyone interested in viewing it can do so at 1 Kapokbos Street at the Village on Sea housing complex in Heiderand, Mossel Bay, from 10:00 today and tomorrow.","html":"Anyone interested in viewing it can do so at 1 Kapokbos Street at the Village on Sea housing complex in Heiderand, Mossel Bay, from 10:00 today and tomorrow."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Unique pottery pieces are on exhibition, as well as jewellery and paintings created by Kobus Spies. Photo: Minda du Plessis","html":"Unique pottery pieces are on exhibition, as well as jewellery and paintings created by Kobus Spies. Photo: Minda du Plessis"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
